title: Voice memo — Mar 27 2019 (singing fragment)
html:
14-second voice memo from late evening Mar 27 2019, grants pass teen era — Whisper labeled it "(singing in foreign language)." No retrievable content; left as a graph node so the recording as note habit is documented for the period. Candidate for re-transcription on a larger Whisper model.

grants pass teen era · grants pass or · recording as note
